James Okafor

Partner

Washington DC

New York

About James

James Okafor is a partner advising clients on antitrust and competition matters before the Federal Trade Commission and Department of Justice. He brings experience in merger review, conduct investigations, and regulatory strategy.

Practice Areas

  • Antitrust & Competition
  • Regulatory Affairs
  • Merger Review

Industries

  • Technology
  • Healthcare
  • Telecommunications

Department

Antitrust

Offices

  • Washington DC
  • New York

  • New York, 2006

Education

  • B.A. in Political Science, Howard University, 2001
